decisions.description: If this is the first run, then create the custom setting.
decisions.name: D_First_Run
decisions.label: First Run?

fields.name: DT_Price_Book_Required
fields.fieldText:
A price book is required before products can be added.

Set a default price book on the Account (QQ Default Price Book) or choose one on the Opportunity, then start a new quote. No quote was created.

fields.name: DT_Products_Required
fields.fieldText:
Add at least one product to this quote.

Select one or more products on the next screen before finishing.

fields.name: DT_Discount_Reason_Help
fields.fieldText:
This quote discounts one or more product lines.

Choose the reason for the discount. It is recorded on the Opportunity so the deal stays auditable and can clear discount approval.

fields.name: PL_Discount_Reason
fields.fieldText: Discount Reason

fields.name: DT_Setup_Admin_Needed
fields.fieldText:
Quicker Quotes has not been set up in this org yet.

First-time setup creates configuration records and needs the Customize Application permission, which sales users do not have. Ask a system administrator to run first-time setup (or run scripts/apex/seed_qq_config.apex), then try again.

fields.name: DT_Confirmation_Text
fields.fieldText:
Your Quote and related records have been created successfully.


Next, submit the quote for approval and then email it to the customer.

fields.name: DT_Opportunity_Details_1
fields.fieldText: Opportunity Details:

fields.name: DT_Create_PDF
fields.fieldText: Create PDF

fields.name: CB_Create_PDF
fields.fieldText: Create PDF

fields.name: PL_Quote_Template
fields.fieldText: Quote Template

fields.name: DT_Error_Info
fields.fieldText: This workflow can only be launched from an Account, Contact, Opportunity, or Bill Data record, or from the Global Action.

fields.name: DT_Quote_Products_Heading
fields.fieldText: Add Quote Products
